name: swift-toolkit
description: Swift/Apple development toolkit with specialized agents for architecture, development, code review, refactoring, testing, diagnostics, security, and project initialization, plus orchestrator skill, workflow-* profile skills, task management skills, workspace-* skills for multi-package SPM workspaces, and slash commands

metadata.description: Swift/Apple development toolkit covering iOS, macOS, SPM packages. Includes architect, developer, reviewer, refactorer, tester, diagnostics, security, init agents, orchestrator skill for task workflow automation, workflow-* profile skills (FEATURE/BUG/REFACTOR/TEST/REVIEW/EPIC), task management skills (task-new, task-move, task-status), workspace-* skills for multi-package SPM workspaces (workspace-init, workspace-add, workspace-docs-regen), and slash commands (/task-new, /task-run, /task-continue, /task-redo, /task-restart, /task-move, /task-status, /workspace-init, /workspace-add, /workspace-docs-regen). Covers UIKit, SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency (async/await), Combine, RxSwift, Swinject DI, and patterns (MVVM, VIPER, Clean Architecture, Coordinator).

plugins.name: swift-toolkit
plugins.description: Swift/Apple development toolkit: agents (architect, developer, reviewer, refactorer, tester, diagnostics, security, init) + orchestrator skill + workflow-* profile skills + task management skills (task-new, task-move, task-status) + workspace-* skills for multi-package SPM workspaces (workspace-init, workspace-add, workspace-docs-regen) + slash commands (task-new/run/continue/redo/restart/move/status, workspace-init/add/docs-regen)
